## 🖥️ Environment
<!-- Please fill in the information below -->

**Server Information:**
- Operating System: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 20.04]
- Server Software: [e.g. Paper, Bukkit]
- Server Version: [e.g. 1.20.1]
- Java Version: [e.g. Java 17]
- Plugin List: [Please use the `/plugins` command or manually list all installed plugins, especially plugins related to Dominion]

**Plugin Information:**
- Dominion Version: [e.g. 4.5.1-beta]
- DomFly Version: [e.g. 3.1.0]
- Other Related Plugins: [If any, list plugins that may conflict]

**Client Information:**
<!-- Optional -->
- Client Version: [e.g. 1.20.1]
- Client Type: [e.g. Vanilla, Forge, Fabric]

## ✅ Checklist

<!-- Use "x" to tick the checkbox -->
